# yaba.studio

Main URL: https://yaba.studio/

Sharp websites, product interfaces and motion for ambitious brands.

## Summary

yaba.studio is an independent design studio for marketing websites, product UI (web and mobile), and motion design. The homepage includes service descriptions, an FAQ, and contact details.

## Key sections

- Services: https://yaba.studio/#services
- FAQ: https://yaba.studio/#faq
- Contact: https://yaba.studio/#contact

## Social

https://x.com/yabastudio

## Crawling

The site is intended to be crawlable by search engines and AI crawlers. No AI crawler restrictions are declared in robots.txt.
